creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
diff -ru fasm.orig/Makefile fasm/Makefile
--- fasm.orig/Makefile  Sat Aug 25 00:37:14 2007
+++ fasm/Makefile       Sat Aug 25 00:43:41 2007
@@ -6,10 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      fasm
-PORTVERSION=   1.67.21
+PORTVERSION=   1.67.22
 CATEGORIES=    lang devel
 MASTER_SITES=  http://flatassembler.net/
-DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}-1.67
 
 MAINTAINER=    skv@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=       Flat, multiple-pass assembler for IA-32 & x86-64 architectures
diff -ru fasm.orig/distinfo fasm/distinfo
--- fasm.orig/distinfo  Sat Aug 25 00:37:14 2007
+++ fasm/distinfo       Sat Aug 25 00:43:41 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (fasm-1.67.tar.gz) = 95a11669c1d28e9de5b2aa2c45a216e0
-SHA256 (fasm-1.67.tar.gz) = 9581aad3e1aa733a0a0d4b7ecead51a1d1d73b8a1d63291a7b40f7d4e96ce5a8
-SIZE (fasm-1.67.tar.gz) = 186423
+MD5 (fasm-1.67.22.tar.gz) = 66934e6d55698eb2611f0733b18d6f95
+SHA256 (fasm-1.67.22.tar.gz) = 8b32131c61a70ef3e3043adecd2e32d3c07c58ecded736817683df7a32086d06
+SIZE (fasm-1.67.22.tar.gz) = 182634
